# ItzRenzo Dev Website - AI Coding Agent Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a static Vite + Tailwind CSS portfolio for ItzRenzo, a Minecraft developer focused on server setups, plugin configuration, RPG systems, menu UI, and gameplay polish.

## Current Stack
- Static site generated by Vite.
- Tailwind CSS v4 via `@tailwindcss/vite`.
- No Laravel, Composer, PHP runtime, database, migrations, or admin panel.
- Content lives in JSON files under `src/data/`.
- Deployment target is Vercel static hosting with output in `dist`.

## Development Commands
```powershell
npm run dev      # Start Vite dev server
npm run build    # Build static site into dist
npm run preview  # Preview production build locally
```

## Content Files
- `src/data/projects.json`: exported portfolio projects. The homepage renders featured projects only.
- `src/data/gallery.json`: full gallery entries sorted by `displayOrder`.
- `src/data/site.json`: hero copy, metrics, expertise cards, trust strip, contact links, and profile image.

## UI Structure
- `index.html`: homepage shell.
- `gallery/index.html`: full gallery page shell.
- `src/main.js`: homepage rendering.
- `src/gallery.js`: gallery page rendering.
- `src/ui.js`: shared rendering helpers and behavior.
- `src/icons.js`: inline SVG icon set.
- `src/styles.css`: Tailwind v4 import, theme tokens, custom layout/effects.

## Design Direction
- Original ItzRenzo design inspired by dark game-tech landing pages.
- Do not copy AstroAC assets, logos, video, text, or branding.
- Use near-black surfaces, blue/cyan/emerald accents, glassy cards, HUD-style grid overlays, and restrained motion.
- Keep UI accessible: visible focus states, semantic links/buttons, keyboard navigation, alt text, and reduced-motion support.

## Implementation Notes
- Avoid introducing a new framework unless explicitly requested.
- Keep content data-driven rather than hard-coding project/gallery items into HTML.
- Use SVG icons from `src/icons.js`; do not use emoji as structural UI icons.
- Preserve responsive checks around 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px.
